title: Woaboy Velvet Curtains 90 Drop Olive Green Curtain for Living Room Thermal Blackout for Bedroom Luxury Eyelet Drapes Soft Window Treatment Insulated Soundproof & Room Darkening W 46 x L 90 2 Panels
features: Multiple Dimensions: 46 inch wide x 90 inch high per panel with 8 x 4cm metal grommets on top, 2 panels in total. The height of the curtain is measured from the top of the ring. Easy to install, it fits most curtain rods on the market. Since our size is measured by hand, there will be a 2-3cm error, please understand.
Velvet Material: Rich velvet curtains have exquisite silky touch.Smoothly to pull and also friendly to children's tender skin.
Room Darkening: 70-85% BLACKOUT (Darker colours have a better blackout effect). Thick and heavy blackout curtain drapes create a dark and cozy environment to enjoy better personal space.
Nice Decoration: High-density velvet curtains have elegant and luxury style, perfect for homes, living rooms, bedrooms, studio, apartment.
Care Instructions: Machine/Hand washable in cold water. Can also be ironed quickly or steam clean at low. Do not use bleach. Use a mild detergent for delicate cleaning.
